title: leucas aspera
intro: Leucas aspera, also known as the bitter button plant or leucas, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. Leucas aspera has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Leucas aspera include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, among others. Leucas aspera is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
